headline: Which dow jones stocks are moving on Thursday?
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: Roche KRAS drug succeeds in head-to-head lung cancer study
summary: The Phase 3 trial compared Roche’s divarasib with treatments sold by Amgen and Bristol Myers in patients with non-small cell lung cancer.

raw.headline: Roche KRAS drug succeeds in head-to-head lung cancer study
raw.summary: The Phase 3 trial compared Roche’s divarasib with treatments sold by Amgen and Bristol Myers in patients with non-small cell lung cancer.

headline: Roche Lung-Cancer Drug Candidate Beats Existing Therapies in Late-Stage Trial
summary: Experimental drug, divarasib, showed meaningful improvements in both patients’ overall survival and the time they survived without the disease worsening.

raw.headline: Roche Lung-Cancer Drug Candidate Beats Existing Therapies in Late-Stage Trial
